title: Stop Evolution
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"2aqj0","text":"Terminate the rhamnose-induced high-mutation-rate evolution phase by replacing the culture medium to remove the inducer, thereby shutting down expression of the mutator DNA polymerase in the OrthoRep system. This allows stabilization and selection of target mutant strains for subsequent phenotypic analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"f5m7d","text":"Bacterial culture after directed evolution (containing rhamnose)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8vac6","text":"Fresh LB broth (without rhamnose)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"41khr","text":"Corresponding antibiotic(s)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ciofm","text":"PBS buffer","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"93e4f","text":"Centrifuge","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7g7g7","text":"Sterile conical tubes","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Take culture from the late stage of directed evolution (grown to OD₆₀₀ = 1.5–2.0).
Transfer into a 50 mL sterile centrifuge tube.
Resuspend the cell pellet in 10 mL pre-chilled PBS .
Resuspend the pellet in 10 mL LB broth without rhamnose .
Supplement the medium with the appropriate antibiotic.
Incubate the culture at 37 °C, 220 rpm for 12 h .
Proceed with downstream experiments (e.g., sequencing, screening, fluorescence analysis).
creator: igemnthuth
